info.title: OpenAI-Compatible Image Generations
info.description: Standard OpenAI-compatible `POST /v1/images/generations` endpoint. Currently supports the **ByteDance Seedream** family. Wan 2.7 image models route through [`/v1/chat/completions`](/api-reference/chat/image-generation) instead, and Gemini image previews route through [`/v1/models/{model}:generateContent`](/api-reference/chat/generatecontent).

post.description:
Generate images with the OpenAI-compatible images-generations endpoint. Currently routed to **ByteDance Seedream** — the Wan 2.7 family does not use this path.

**Size constraint.** Seedream's upstream requires a minimum of **3,686,400 pixels** per image. Requests below that return `400 InvalidParameter: image size must be at least 3686400 pixels`. A 1024×1024 image (1,048,576 px) is rejected; 1920×1920 (3,686,400 px) and 2048×2048 (4,194,304 px) are accepted. Other aspect ratios are fine as long as `width × height ≥ 3,686,400`.

model.description: Image generation model. Currently only `seedream-4-5-251128` is routed through this endpoint. Wan 2.7 models use `/v1/chat/completions`.

x-doc.desc_en: Which image model to run. On this endpoint it pins the call to the Seedream family; Wan 2.7 models must instead be called through `/v1/chat/completions`.
x-doc.title_zh: 本次调用使用的图像模型。在本接口上它将调用锁定到 Seedream 系列;Wan 2.7 模型须改走 `/v1/chat/completions`。

prompt.description: Text description of the image to generate.

x-doc.desc_en: Natural-language description of the image you want. It is the main driver of the result — be specific about subject, style, and lighting for better output.
x-doc.title_zh: 你想要的图像的自然语言描述。它是结果的主要驱动信号 —— 对主体、风格、光照描述得越具体,产出越好。

n.description: Number of images to generate. Each image is billed separately at the per-image rate.

x-doc.desc_en: How many images to generate in one call. Each generated image is billed separately at the per-image rate, so a higher count multiplies cost.
x-doc.title_zh: 单次调用生成的图像数量。每张图按单图费率分别计费,数量越多成本成倍增加。

size.description: Image dimensions as `WIDTHxHEIGHT`. Must satisfy `width × height ≥ 3,686,400`. Common valid values: `1920x1920`, `2048x2048`, `2304x1600`, `2560x1920`.

x-doc.desc_en: Output dimensions in `WIDTHxHEIGHT` form. Seedream's upstream enforces a minimum of 3,686,400 pixels (`width × height`), so e.g. `1024x1024` is rejected while `1920x1920` and larger pass; any aspect ratio is fine as long as the pixel total clears the floor.
x-doc.title_zh: 输出尺寸,形如 `WIDTHxHEIGHT`。Seedream 上游要求像素总数(`宽 × 高`)不低于 3,686,400,因此 `1024x1024` 会被拒,`1920x1920` 及更大可通过;只要像素总数过线,任意宽高比都可以。

value.prompt: A cute red panda, ultra-detailed, cinematic lighting
A futuristic cyberpunk city, neon lights, rainy night, 8k
Oil painting of a rolling hillside at sunset

x-doc.desc_en: The model that actually produced these images, echoing the requested model.
x-doc.title_zh: 实际生成这些图像的模型,回显请求中指定的模型。

x-doc.desc_en: When the images were generated, as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
x-doc.title_zh: 图像生成的时间,Unix 时间戳(秒)。

url.description: Short-lived URL to the generated image. Download and persist it; the URL expires.

x-doc.desc_en: Short-lived URL to a generated image. It expires, so download and persist the image promptly rather than relying on the link long-term.
x-doc.title_zh: 指向某张生成图的临时 URL。该链接会过期,应尽快下载并持久化图像,不要长期依赖此链接。

size.description: Actual dimensions of the returned image.

x-doc.desc_en: The actual dimensions of the returned image, which may differ from the requested size after upstream adjustment.
x-doc.title_zh: 返回图像的实际尺寸,经上游调整后可能与请求尺寸不同。

x-doc.desc_en: The generated images, one entry per image — its count matches the requested `n`.
x-doc.title_zh: 生成的图像,每张一个条目 —— 数量与请求的 `n` 一致。

x-doc.desc_en: Number of images actually generated and billed in this call.
x-doc.title_zh: 本次实际生成并计费的图像数量。

x-doc.desc_en: Tokens attributed to producing the output for this call, used in cost calculation.
x-doc.title_zh: 本次产出所计的输出 token 数,参与成本计算。

x-doc.desc_en: Total tokens charged for this call.
x-doc.title_zh: 本次调用计费的总 token 数。

x-doc.desc_en: Resource-usage breakdown for this call, used for billing and quota tracking.
x-doc.title_zh: 本次调用的资源用量明细,用于计费与配额核算。

400.description: Invalid request. Most common: `size` smaller than 3,686,400 pixels → `"image size must be at least 3686400 pixels"`.

401.description: Missing or invalid AIsa API key.

404.description: The model isn't routed through this endpoint. Wan 2.7 models return `openai_error` here — use `/v1/chat/completions` for those.

x-doc.desc_en: Generate images from a text prompt via the OpenAI-compatible images endpoint. On AIsa this path routes to the ByteDance Seedream family only; Wan 2.7 image models go through `/v1/chat/completions` and Gemini image previews through `/v1/models/{model}:generateContent`. Mind the upstream minimum-pixel requirement on the requested size, or the request is rejected.
x-doc.description_zh: 通过 OpenAI 兼容的图像接口,从文本提示词生成图像。在 AIsa 上,该路径仅路由到 ByteDance Seedream 系列;Wan 2.7 图像模型走 `/v1/chat/completions`,Gemini 图像预览走 `/v1/models/{model}:generateContent`。注意上游对请求尺寸有最小像素要求,否则请求会被拒绝。
x-doc.resp_section_intro: 成功时返回生成的图像列表及本次调用的用量统计。

errors.message_zh: 请求无效,最常见是 `size` 像素数低于下限,返回「image size must be at least 3686400 pixels」。
AIsa API Key 缺失或无效。
该模型未路由到本接口;Wan 2.7 系列会在此返回 `openai_error`,应改用 `/v1/chat/completions`。
上游模型供应商不可达。

x-doc.errors_source: spec 已声明 400/401/404/429/500/502(仅 description,无错误体结构)
